import api from"./api";import{getUserFromLocalStorage}from"./authService";// Tạo Payment Intent cho thanh toán
export const createPaymentIntent=orderId=>{return api.post("/payments/create-intent",{orderId},{headers:getUserFromLocalStorage()});};// Xử lý thanh toán
export const processPayment=_ref=>{let{orderId,paymentIntentId,walletAddress}=_ref;return api.post("/payments/process",{orderId,paymentIntentId,walletAddress},{headers:getUserFromLocalStorage()});};// Lấy trạng thái thanh toán
export const getPaymentStatus=orderId=>{return api.get(`/payments/${orderId}/status`,{headers:getUserFromLocalStorage()});};
